name: Nitin
wishText: Thank you for being kind, patient, funny, charismatic, and everything this team looks up to.
textInChatBox: Happy birthday, Nitin! From all of us at Laing+Simmons Oakville | Windsor - wishing you warmth, laughter, respect, and all the appreciation you deserve.
text2: That's what we were going to do.
text5Content: you make people feel seen, trusted, backed, and ready to grow.
